description_long: This is a large, armored combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a rotating turret mounted centrally on its hull. The vehicle is painted in a solid matte green color, with visible tracks on both sides for all-terrain mobility. The turret features a long-barreled cannon extending forward, a secondary hatch, and what appears to be a periscope or sighting device. The rear of the vehicle has two cylindrical exhausts and an antenna, suggesting communication capabilities. The hull and turret are covered in thick, sloped armor plating, designed to deflect incoming projectiles. The vehicle's exterior is rugged, with visible bolts, hatches, and reinforced surfaces, indicating its military purpose and durability.
description: A large, matte green armored combat vehicle with a central rotating turret, long cannon, and heavy tracks. Features include sloped armor, exhausts, and an antenna for communication.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, sloped glacis plate, central turret, and the cannon pointing forward, with tracks visible on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, the side profile of the turret, and the detailed track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two cylindrical exhausts, rear armor, and the antenna, with the turret and cannon facing away.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, turret, and track system, with additional details of the rear storage or equipment boxes.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret, located centrally on the vehicle's roof; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte green color; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: A single circular insignia with a yellow border and black center on the turret roof; no other visible markings.
